subject: We're hiring — open roles at StartupCo
body_plain:
Hi Shawn,

StartupCo has several open roles:

- Senior Software Engineer — backend platform
- Full Stack Engineer — product team
- Data Engineer — analytics

Apply:
https://jobs.lever.co/startupco/senior-backend
https://jobs.lever.co/startupco/fullstack

Thanks,
StartupCo People Team
